macro_context.summary: Global risk appetite improving on US-China trade dialogue progress. Domestic liquidity remains ample with PBOC maintaining accommodative stance. Tech and new energy themes leading.

key_variables.name: US-China trade dialogue
key_variables.change: Senior officials meeting scheduled for late May, market interpreting as positive signal

key_variables.name: PBOC liquidity stance
key_variables.change: MLF rate unchanged, net injection 50B CNY this week

key_variables.name: US Fed rate expectations
key_variables.change: Market pricing 1 cut by September, data-dependent

notes_for_tasks.background: Trade dialogue positive for chip equipment imports; domestic substitution narrative still strong
notes_for_tasks.what_to_verify: Actual tariff reduction scope, equipment import approval timeline

notes_for_tasks.background: Solid-state battery announcements creating sector momentum
notes_for_tasks.what_to_verify: Production milestone confirmations in Q3, subsidy policy updates
